curation_notes: Patch modifies only src/libImaging/Jpeg2KDecode.c (1 non-test source file). The fix replaces a uniform component-width assumption (using nb_comps or a hardcoded 3→4 mapping) with a per-component precision sum to correctly compute tile buffer size. CWE-125 (Out-of-bounds Read) maps directly to buffer-overflow class — no override needed. Location derived from the patch diff: the vulnerable buffer size calculation is in j2k_decode_entry. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern (Jpeg2KEncode.c handles the encode path with different buffer logic).
